name: 7pc Click in Place Rolling Storage Cart Kit Plastic Storage Home and Office Organization - Brightroom™​
description:
Home organization is made easier with this 4-Piece Storage Bin Set from Brightroom™. This set contains a large bin with an open front, two storage bins, and a tray with a lid boasting a top handle. They can be stacked on top of each other for efficient storage, and the top handle and four castor wheels offer easy portability.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
